messages.content: My order #4471 still hasn't arrived and it's been two weeks.
Thanks for reaching out — I'm sorry your order is late. I can offer a refund or a replacement shipped today. Which would you prefer?
I'd like a replacement, but can you make sure it's the blue one this time?
I was charged twice for my subscription this month.
I'm sorry about the double charge — that shouldn't happen. I can refund the duplicate right away or apply it as account credit. Which works best?
Please refund it to my card. How long will that take?
I want to cancel my plan.
I'm sorry to see you go. Before you cancel, I can offer a 30% discount or pause your plan for up to 3 months. Would either help?
A pause sounds good actually. Can you pause it for two months?
